title: Neon Optimized
body:
The Neo Optimized modpack is designed to boost your Minecraft performance while keeping the gameplay experience enjoyable. It includes a variety of lightweight mods that enhance graphics and improve frame rates, helping to reduce lag.


<details>
<summary>Mods</summary>

Bad Optimizations - https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations

Cloth Config API - https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config

Dynamic FPS - https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps

Entity Culling - https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling

FerritCore - https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core

ImmediatelyFast - https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast

Iris Shader - https://modrinth.com/mod/iris

Just Zoom - https://modrinth.com/mod/just-zoom

Konkerete - https://modrinth.com/mod/konkrete

ModernFix  https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix

More Culling - https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling

Noisium - https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium

Reese's Sodium Options - https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options

Sodium - https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium

Sodium Extra - https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra

</details>
